What We Fix
Our Services
💻

Laptops & Computers

Screen replacements, motherboard repair, data recovery, overheating fixes, port repair, and full system diagnostics. We go deeper than the average shop.

Board-level repairs available
🔌

Home Appliances

Coffee makers, small kitchen appliances, and household electronics. We diagnose the actual fault — not just swap parts until something works.

Most brands accepted
🔧

Electronics & Circuit Boards

Component-level soldering, capacitor replacement, power supply repair, and full electronic board diagnostics. L3 capability means we fix what others send back unfixed.

L3 component-level repair
🔋

Power Tools

Battery rebuilds, motor repair, switch replacement, and full restoration on brands like DeWalt, Milwaukee, and more. Get your tools working again instead of buying new.

DeWalt, Milwaukee & more
🛠️

Diagnostic Services

Not sure what's wrong? Bring it in. We'll run a full diagnostic and give you an honest assessment before any work begins — no surprise charges.

Honest, transparent pricing
🤝

Business & Contract Work

Need ongoing repair support for your business? We offer contract arrangements for offices, property managers, and small businesses. Reliable, recurring service you can count on.

Contact us for rates
Why Yoshiistore
Real Repairs.
Real Skill.
  • 01

    L3-Certified Repair Depth

    Most shops do L1 or L2 — swap parts and hope. We diagnose and repair at the component level, which means lower costs and actually fixing the root cause.

  • 02

    No-Fix, No-Fee Approach

    We tell you what's wrong before we charge you. Transparent diagnostics, honest quotes, no surprises on your bill.

  • 03

    Local & Accountable

    We're right here in Arlington Heights. You know where to find us. No shipping your device across the country and waiting weeks.

  • 04

    We Fix What Others Won't

    If another shop turned you away or quoted you the price of a new device, bring it to us. We've restored items most would throw away.

Nationwide Service
Mail-In Repair
1

Submit Your Repair Request

Fill out the intake form below describing your device and issue. We'll respond within 24 hours with a quote and shipping instructions.

2

Pay Diagnostic Deposit

A small $20 deposit covers the diagnostic. This goes toward your repair cost if you approve the work. No deposit, no ship — this protects both of us.

3

Ship Your Device

Pack your device securely and ship it to our P.O. Box. We recommend USPS Priority Mail for tracking and speed. We'll confirm when it arrives.

4

We Diagnose & Quote

We'll fully diagnose your device and send you a detailed repair quote. You approve before we touch anything. No surprise charges — ever.

5

Repaired & Shipped Back

Once repaired and payment is complete, we ship your device back within 1-2 business days. Typical total turnaround is 7-10 business days.
